UserDialog.DialogText: Please complete Heavensward MSQ before attempting to start Stormblood

UserDialog.DialogText: We are about to queue for Bardam's Mettle. The second Simon Says boss can't be done by the bot. The bot will pause before this boss to allow you to do it manually. When ready press continue.

UserDialog.DialogText: Please complete the solo duty Emissary of the Dawn.\n\nRoleplay as Alphinaud after an airship crash.
